guide.title: LaLa Stay House Guide
guide.intro1: Welcome to Lala Stay! We hope you enjoy your stay.
guide.intro2: Please check this page first — most questions are answered here. If something isn't covered, contact us using the emergency contacts at the bottom.
wifi.title: 📶 Wi-Fi
wifi.qr: You can also connect by scanning the QR code on top of the router.
wifi.trouble: If it won't connect, turn the router off, wait 30 seconds, and turn it back on.
entry.title: 🔑 Entry & Access
entry.door.title: Front door keypad
entry.door.code: The door code is sent to you separately in your booking message.
entry.door.change: For your security, you may change the code during your stay if you'd like.
entry.door.autolock: The door locks automatically when it closes, so always remember the code before you step out — there is no physical key.
entry.door.battery: If you hear a low-battery warning beep, please let the host know.
entry.door.restore: Before check-out, please set the code back to the original one you received.
entry.time.title: Check-in / Check-out
entry.time.adjust: If you need to adjust your arrival or departure time, please message us in advance.
home.title: 🛋 Inside the Home
boiler.title: Heating & Hot Water (Boiler)
boiler.loc: The boiler controller is on the wall in the main room.
boiler.ondol: In Korea, floor heating (ondol) warms the room through the floor, so it may take a little time to feel warm.
boiler.away: If you'll be out for a long time, switch it to "외출 / Away" mode to save energy.
ac.title: Air Conditioner
ac.body: Operated by remote control. Each room has its own remote.
cooktop.title: Electric Cooktop
cooktop.intro: The cooktop has two independent burners — the control panel is split into Touch 1 (right) and Touch 2 (left). The ON/OFF and lock buttons on the far right control the whole unit.
cooktop.quick: Quick start — hold ON/OFF, press ▲ within 20 seconds, cook, then hold ON/OFF to turn off.
cooktop.power: Power — press and hold ON/OFF for 1.5 seconds to turn on or off. If you don't press anything within 20 seconds of turning it on, it shuts off automatically.
cooktop.temp: Heat level — after turning it on, adjust with the ▲ / ▼ buttons. (Maximum level 9)
cooktop.timer: Timer — press the timer button, the display switches to "00", then use ▲ / ▼ to set 1–60 minutes.
cooktop.lock: If nothing responds, the child lock is on. Hold the lock button for 3 seconds to release it. The lock stays active even after the power is turned off.
cooktop.h: "H" on the display means the surface is still hot (above 50°C / 122°F). It clears automatically once the surface cools — please don't touch it while "H" is showing.
cooktop.off: Always turn the power off after cooking.
cooktop.pan: Cookware with a flat bottom works best. Basic pots and pans are already provided.
washer.title: Washing Machine
washer.loc: Located in the kitchen. Detergent is on the sink counter, to the left of the machine.
tv.title: TV
tv.power: Press the power button on the remote to turn it on.
tv.account: Please sign in to Netflix / YouTube with your own account, and sign out before you leave.
etc.title: Other
etc.dryer: The hair dryer is on the vanity table.
etc.towel: Spare towels are in the bathroom.
nearby.title: 🛒 Nearby
nearby.mart: Supermarket — Time Store Mart / 2 min walk
nearby.hospital: Clinics / Hospitals — several near Hongik Univ. Station / 5 min walk
nearby.atm: ATM / Bank — CU Hongdae Seogyo branch / 2 min walk
nearby.medical: For medical help in English, you can call 1339 (medical info line) or 1330 (Korea Travel Helpline, 24-hour, multilingual).
transport.title: 🚇 Getting Around
transport.subway: Nearest subway station — Hongik Univ. Station (홍대입구역), Line 2 / 2 min walk
transport.bus: Bus stop — Hongik Univ. Station bus stop / 3 min walk
transport.airport: To the airport — airport bus or AREX airport railroad from Hongik Univ. Station
transport.taxi: Taxi — we recommend the Kakao T app (English available).
faq.title: ❓ FAQ
faq.a1: A. Check whether the boiler is in "외출 / Away" mode and switch it to "실내 / Indoor". If it still doesn't work, contact us.
faq.a2: A. Please check the "hot water" (right) button on the boiler.
faq.q3: Q. I need extra towels / bedding.
faq.a3: A. Amenities are not restocked automatically. Please contact us if you need more.
faq.q4: Q. Can I drop off luggage early or check out late?
faq.a4: A. Please message us in advance and we'll let you know if it's possible.
leaving.title: 👋 Check-out
leaving.intro: Before you leave, please check the list below. You don't need to do a deep clean.
leaving.item1: Sort and take out food waste & general trash
leaving.item2: Wash the dishes you used (or run the dishwasher)
leaving.item3: Lock windows; set boiler to "외출 / Away" mode; turn off A/C and lights
leaving.item4: Reset the door code to the original one you received
leaving.item5: Close the front door and confirm it locks automatically
leaving.thanks: Thank you for staying with us — a review would mean a lot! 🙏
